message:
fix(newproj): add plain 'java' case to tech stack detection

The detect_initial_tech_stack function was missing a pattern for plain
'java' tech type detection. This caused Java projects that were detected
as 'java' (without -maven or -gradle suffix) to not be properly mapped
to the java option in the tech stack selector.

Added 'java' to the case pattern alongside 'java-maven' and 'java-gradle'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
